characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Abnormal Ammo: Often used by Narutaki with his equally-abnormal gun. Accidental Hero: Narutaki foils a bank heist (unintentionally) while chasing a lost cat across town. Androids and Detectives: The series pairs young detective Narutaki with aRobot Buddynamed Goriki. Together, they fight crime. Breather Episode: Episode 13, wherein there's no criminal activity whatsoever and the best job Narutaki could get wastracking down a stray cat. Dagwood Sandwich: Episode 13. Narutaki orders one at a streetside stand because he isvery, very bored. He has to squish it down to the size of a normal sandwich and eat it all in one go when thestray cathe's been after all episode wanders by.

characters.name: Narutaki
characters.description: Abnormal Ammo: Often used by Narutaki with his equally-abnormal gun. Accidental Hero: Narutaki foils a bank heist (unintentionally) while chasing a lost cat across town. Androids and Detectives: The series pairs young detective Narutaki with aRobot Buddynamed Goriki. Together, they fight crime. Breather Episode: Episode 13, wherein there's no criminal activity whatsoever and the best job Narutaki could get wastracking down a stray cat. Dagwood Sandwich: Episode 13. Narutaki orders one at a streetside stand because he isvery, very bored. He has to squish it down to the size of a normal sandwich and eat it all in one go when thestray cathe's been after all episode wanders by.

characters.name: Hsu Ling Ling
characters.description: Ascended Fangirl: Ling Ling appears in Steam King's third novel, much to her surprise. Combat Medic: Ling Ling is a nurse, and she has been known to get involved in the action. "I Know You Are in There Somewhere" Fight: Ling Ling toSteam King. Limited Wardrobe: Wears her nurse outfit almost nonstop.Except when going swimming, to the gym, or in the bathtub, of course. Nice Girl: Ling Ling is very sensitive and very caring to others.

characters.name: Goriki
characters.description: Androids and Detectives: The series pairs young detective Narutaki with aRobot Buddynamed Goriki. Together, they fight crime. Mundane Utility: Goriki possesses a tong attachment, used for delicately picking up pastries. When he accidentally crushes it, causing the cream to spill out, he then adopts aPose of Supplication. Stock Footage: Whenever Goriki is called upon and sent through the underground pass. This Is a Drill: Goriki's standardFinishing Move. Victory Pose: In particular is when Goriki (finally) places a pastry on his tray without it getting squashed. He is then summarily charged hundreds of times for the one pastry he succeeded in getting, as well as all the failures. CueHeroic BSoD.

characters.name: Dr. Guilty
characters.description: For Science!: Where Dr. Hsu and Dr. Guilty disagreed on about using Megamaton technology.

characters.name: Onigawara
characters.description: Inspector Javert: Onigawara displays this trait in an episode where Goriki (and Narutaki, by extension) are framed.

characters.name: Night Phantom
characters.description: Expy: Night Phantom looks like a villainousBatman. Sins of the Father: Narutaki's father killed his father, and he's obsessed withDisproportionate Retributionlevels of revenge.

characters.name: Crimson Scorpion
characters.description: A Twinkle in the Sky: She's a common victim of this. Classy Cat-Burglar: She's a thief who loves precious gems and jewelery. Curtains Match the Window: She has red hair and eyes. Shout-Out: One of Crimson Scorpion's targets is theSilent Möbius, said to be one of the world's greatest jewels. "Scooby-Doo" Hoax: Crimson Scorpion is fond of them. Narutaki ain't fooled.

characters.name: Machine Baron
characters.description: A Twinkle in the Sky: He's a common victim of this. The Collector: Obsessed with collecting rare and unique pieces of machinery, and wants Goriki to be the prize of his collection.His collection mania actually helps save the day in the finale, as Goriki is broken and requires long out-of-production parts to be repaired that can't be found anywhere in Steam City - except in Machine Baron's collection. Exploding Calendar: An early episode uses the X'ed days variation as the Machine Baron counts down to a significant date, and plays it pretty much straight.

characters.name: Le Bled
characters.description: Expy: Le Bled is very reminiscent ofChar Aznable. Incurable Cough of Death: Le Bled's reason for doing what he does; he wants to live his life to the fullest before he dies. Shout-Out: In episode 19, Le Bled quotes a line from Vera Lynn's "We'll Meet Again" as he flees the scene.
